parameters.text:
=:rotating_light: *CRITICAL ALERT: Data Center Environmental Issue*

*PUE:* {{ $('Analyze PUE & Thermal Data').first().json.pue.current }} ({{ $('Analyze PUE & Thermal Data').first().json.pue.status }})
*Avg Temperature:* {{ $('Analyze PUE & Thermal Data').first().json.thermal.avgTemperature }}°C
*Critical Hotspots:* {{ $('Analyze PUE & Thermal Data').first().json.thermal.criticalHotspots.length }}

{{ $('Analyze PUE & Thermal Data').first().json.thermal.criticalHotspots.length > 0 ? '*Hotspot Locations:*\n' + $('Analyze PUE & Thermal Data').first().json.thermal.criticalHotspots.map(h => `• ${h.location}: ${h.temperature}°C`).join('\n') : '' }}

*ServiceNow Incident Created*

_AI is analyzing and will provide recommendations shortly._
